text: Node.js is an open-source, cross-platform JavaScript runtime built on Google's V8 engine, created by Ryan Dahl in 2009

Its event loop architecture handles thousands of concurrent connections on a single thread without the overhead of thread-per-connection models: - Event Loop: Single-threaded but asynchronous — I/O operations are delegated to the OS kernel via libuv's thread pool - Non-blocking I/O: File system, network, and DNS operations never block the main thre
